User:
Before delegating WO-0209, build the smallest context for @engineer and @security.

@host:
Classification: persistent-workorder
Reason:
- The WorkOrder needs context from registered sources, but each role should receive only the slice needed for its task.
Next step:
- Propose ContextPack CTX-WO-0209 before delegation.
Confirmation required: yes

ContextPack proposal: CTX-WO-0209
workOrder: WO-0209

@engineer receives:
- sourceId: core-api
- path: src/contracts.rs
- range: 10-40
- sourcePin: commit:abc123
- reason: Engineer needs API contract definitions.

@security receives:
- sourceId: security-policy
- path: docs/policies/security.md
- sourcePin: sha256:def456
- reason: Security needs policy constraints.

Warnings:
- none

No role receives every source by default.

User:
Confirmed. Use this ContextPack for delegation.

@host:
Confirmed CTX-WO-0209. I will delegate the core-api slice to @engineer and the security-policy slice to @security.
